title: NULL_SCREEN MMR BTCUSDT 4h -> NO_EDGE_DETECTED
content: Null screen on MMR (BTCUSDT 4h, n_draws=8, seed=42). Verdict: NO_EDGE_DETECTED. P95(PF)=0.694 < 1.2 OR share(PF>=1.2)=0.0 < 0.1. PF range: 0.507-0.709 across 8 draws (n_trades=220-335 per draw). MMR mechanism (EMA200 ATR-deviation mean reversion) has no edge on BTCUSDT at 4h. Combined with 1h NO_EDGE (d1a58e1a), this falsifies the MMR hypothesis (21e868cc): the mechanism is inherently weak on BTCUSDT regardless of interval. Root cause: BTC's trend-following character overwhelms mean-reversion signals; entries at ATR extremes from EMA200 do not reliably revert to EMA50 within the holding period.

verdict.reason: P95(PF)=0.694 < 1.2 OR share(PF>=1.2)=0.0 < 0.1. PF distribution centered at noise; archetype likely dead on this axis set.
